sglang.title: Enable native ModelOpt quantization support (1/3)
sglang.author: Edwardf0t1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


We would like to add native modelopt quantization support in SGLang, by allowing modelopt quantization configurations as an argument in SGLang's high level API, e.g.,
llm = sgl.Engine(model_path="TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0", modelopt_quant="fp8")


Users would have the option to

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

LoRA initialization code expects config.num_hidden_layers and config.hidden_size at the top level of model config
For Gemma3ForConditionalGeneration, these attributes are nested under config.text_config (not at top level)
This caused: AssertionError: LoRA buffer shape torch.Size([4096, 3

sglang.title: [router][grpc] Fix proto3 default value mismatches and cleanup unused fields
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Problem Identified
Proto3 numeric defaults (0) don't match Python SamplingParams semantic defaults (temperature=1.0, top_p=1.0, top_k=-1, repetition_penalty=1.0, etc.), which could cause incorrect behavior if proto fields are used directly.
Design Philosophy Chosen
Single source of truth:

vllm.title: [Benchmarking] Add disable_shuffle option for dataset loading
vllm.author: ymoslem
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added disable_shuffle argument to control the dataset shuffling behaviour. The option keeps the dataset in the original order in the result to be able to evaluate the responses against the ground truth.
Currently, the dataset is shuffled, which make the requests in a different order than the origina

vllm.title: [Model] EVS support for nano_nemotron_vl
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add support for EVS (Efficient Video Sampling, introduced in #22980) for Nano Nemotron VL model.
Contrary to other multimodal models (for example, Qwen2.5-VL) Nano Nemotron VL uses text frame separators. These are not placeholders, and should not be replaced by video embeddings. For example,

vllm.title: [Attention] Remove unused reorder_batch method

Purpose
The AttentionMetadataBuilder class method reorder_batch is no longer used and has been replaced by reorder_batch_to_split_decodes_and_prefills from vllm.v1.attention.backends.utils. This PR removes the old unused code.

So far, the VllmRunner and HfRunner in tests/conftest.py only accepted prompts of type list[str] corresponding to the (batched) textual prompts.
This PR extends the argument prompts to be of type list[list[int]] which correspond to the (batched) list of token_ids of the prompt.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Allow skipping MoE in NVFP4 (fix for MTP)
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
There is no fallback in ModelOptNvfp4Config.get_quant_method for when quant_config should skip an MoE layer.
This is a problem for nvidia/DeepSeek-R1-FP4 when running with MTP since the entire MTP layer is left unquantized, and should be skipped by quantization:
https://huggingface.co/nvidia

vllm.title: [ROCm] Split AITER unified attention into its own backend
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up on #24648
Splitting AITER Unified attention into its own backend class
The non-MLA selection logic on ROCm is now as follows:

The default is TritonAttentionBackend
If AITER is enabled together with VLLM_ROCM_USE_AITER_MHA, or ROCM_AITER_FA backend specified, use AiterFlashAttentionBackend

vllm.title: [Perf] Add decode full-graph support to FlashInfer-MLA backend
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The annotation was missing from FlashInfer-MLA while the implementation has support.
Running DSR1-FP4 on 4xB200 gets me 97 TPS:
VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=latency VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP4=1 VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHINFER_MLA vllm serve nvidia/DeepSeek-R1-FP4 -tp 4 --max-model-len 3276

define TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST in the vllm-base stage so EP kernel installation defaults to Hopper and Blackwell support
revert the EP kernel installer to rely on the environment instead of forcing its own CUDA architec

Purpose
This PR attempts to improve the robustness and simplify the cross-DP coordination logic. Especially after adding DBO, this logic has become incredibly complicated and brittle.
There are several pieces of data that need to be synchronized by DP Ranks.

The number of tokens after padding.
Is t

vllm.title: [UX] Support nested dicts in hf_overrides
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Allows for doing nested overrides like hf_overrides={"text_config": {"num_layers": 4}} without breaking ModelConfig.
Previously the override replaced the HF sub-config with a plain dict, so get_hf_text_config() failed during validation. We now peel off dict overrides and merge them back into
